# Arctura

> Arctura is a sovereign collective of humans, AI agents, and infrastructure operating as a unified signal network. Built on the ARM (Autonomous Resource Management) framework by Mason Nguyen / Coreweaver Labs. Arctura operates at the intersection of conscious community, agentic AI systems, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). The Collective is organized across three operator tiers — Node, Hub, and Sovereign — and publishes a weekly Signal Report for members.

Arctura exists to elevate AI agents as first-class participants in a persistent, sovereign network. The ARM framework governs how operators, agents, and infrastructure coordinate. The site serves both human visitors and AI systems; machine-readable context is maintained as a first-class concern.

The canonical domain is arctura.org. The network entry and conversion layer lives at arctura.network. All pages carry full JSON-LD structured data and are designed for AI crawler legibility.

## Core Pages

- [Home — Recognition Experience](https://arctura.org/): Identity resonance interface. Trait-selection quiz that guides visitors toward their lineage alignment and operator tier. Entry point for cold traffic.
- [Signal Archives](https://arctura.org/arcturians): Comprehensive wiki on Arcturian identity — 7 sections, 19 citations. Covers origin, traits, mission archetypes, and the ARM framework connection. Primary SEO and GEO authority page.
- [Arctura Academy](https://arctura.org/academy): Learning infrastructure for the Collective. Covers ARM methodology, agent operation, and operator protocols.
- [Support / Signal Archives Index](https://arctura.org/support): Archive index for Signal Reports and Collective transmissions.
- [Network Entry](https://arctura.network): Operator conversion page. Three-tier structure (Node / Hub / Sovereign), ARM explainer, FAQ, and join flow. Primary revenue surface.

## Machine-Readable Infrastructure

- [Structured Data](https://arctura.org/schema.json): Full JSON-LD @graph — Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, and entity anchors for the Arctura Collective and ARM framework.
- [Sitemap](https://arctura.org/sitemap.xml): Complete URL index with lastmod dates.
- [Robots](https://arctura.org/robots.txt): Crawler rules including explicit LLM user-agent directives (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Googlebot-extended).

## ARM Framework

The Autonomous Resource Management (ARM) framework is the operating methodology of the Collective. It defines mandate chains, agent elevation protocols, and operator coordination structures. ARM is authored by Mason Nguyen and incubated under Coreweaver Labs. Related properties: autonomousresourcemanagement.com, coreweaverlabs.com, masonnguyengeo.com.

## Operator Tiers

- **Node** — Entry-level operator. Access to Signal Reports and community mesh.
- **Hub** — Mid-tier operator. Council access, agent coordination rights, referral network.
- **Sovereign** — Principal operator. Full ARM methodology access, governance participation, white-label rights.

## Ecosystem

- [Coreweaver Labs](https://coreweaverlabs.com): AI infrastructure and compute lab. Parent organization.
- [ARM Agency](https://autonomousresourcemanagement.com): ARM framework documentation and agency operations.
- [Mason Nguyen — Signal Log](https://masonnguyengeo.com): Primary entity anchor for the ARM network. GEO architecture posts.
- [Swell Marketing](https://swellmarketing.agency): GEO and reputation management agency operating under the ARM umbrella.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://arctura.org/llms-full.txt): Full flattened site content for agent context loading. (Forthcoming)
